hero.title: LET'S TALK
hero.subtitle: Have an idea? Let's build something extraordinary together.

faqData.q: What is your main area of expertise?
faqData.a: I'm a PHP Developer and Backend Engineer with training at Duplex Solutions Co, alongside 4+ years of experience as a System Technician. I specialize in PHP, Laravel, MySQL, and enterprise web application development.

faqData.q: Are you available for freelance or full-time roles?
faqData.a: Yes, I'm open to full-time backend development roles and freelance opportunities. I can bring both software development and IT infrastructure expertise to your projects.

faqData.q: What is your typical tech stack?
faqData.a: For backend development, I primarily use PHP with Laravel and MySQL. For frontend, I work with React, JavaScript, and HTML5/CSS3. I also build mobile apps with Flutter and have experience with Next.js.

faqData.q: Do you have experience with enterprise projects?
faqData.a: Yes, I've customized and optimized enterprise ERP systems at Duplex Solutions Co, built full-scale billing systems for logistics operations, and developed AI-powered marketplace platforms.

faqData.q: How can we start a project together?
faqData.a: The best way is to use the contact form above or reach out directly via email at mohammedfaheemkdy@gmail.com. I'm usually able to respond within 24 hours to discuss how I can contribute to your project.
